title: Staff AI Engineer
company_focus: Ecommerce acceleration platform using AI and ML
description:
Are you obsessed with data, partner success, taking action,
and changing the game? If you have a whole lot of hustle and
a touch of nerd, come work with Pattern! We want you to use
your skills to push one of the fastest-growing companies
headquartered in the US to the top of the list.

Pattern accelerates brands on global ecommerce marketplaces
leveraging proprietary technology and AI. Utilizing more
than 46 trillion data points, sophisticated machine learning
and AI models, Pattern optimizes and automates all levers of
ecommerce growth for global brands, including advertising,
content management, logistics and fulfillment, pricing,
forecasting and customer service. Hundreds of global brands
depend on Pattern’s ecommerce acceleration platform every
day to drive profitable revenue growth across 60+ global
marketplaces—including Amazon, Walmart.com, Target.com,
eBay, Tmall, TikTok Shop, JD, and Mercado Libre. To learn
more, visit pattern.com or email press@pattern.com.

Pattern has been named one of the fastest growing tech
companies headquartered in North America by Deloitte and one
of best-led companies by Inc. We place employee experience
at the center of our business model and have been recognized
as one of Newsweek’s Global Most Loved Workplaces®.

Develop AI workflows and agentic patterns to help solve
complex problems at scale that normally require human
intervention. Work closely with both the core AI engineering
team and top level leadership.

Key Responsibilities:-

- Lead the design and implementation of sophisticated AI
  workflows and agentic systems that automate complex
  business processes
- - Architect scalable AI solutions that integrate with
  Pattern's existing technology stack and business
  operations
- - Mentor junior AI engineers and provide technical
  leadership across AI initiatives
- - Collaborate with product and business teams to identify
  high-impact opportunities for AI implementation
- - Develop proof-of-concepts and prototypes to validate AI
  approaches before full implementation
- - Establish best practices, coding standards, and
  architectural patterns for AI development
- - Contribute to the company's AI strategy and roadmap in
  partnership with leadership

Requirements:-

- - 8+ years of experience in software engineering with at
  least 3 years focused on AI/ML systems
- - Strong Python programming skills with experience in modern
  AI frameworks and libraries
- - Deep understanding of LLMs, RAG systems, fine-tuning, and
  agentic AI architectures
- - Experience building production AI systems that solve real
  business problems at scale
- - Proficiency with cloud infrastructure (AWS preferred) and
  containerization technologies
- - Strong system design skills with experience building
  distributed and fault-tolerant applications
- - Excellent communication skills with the ability to explain
  complex technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders
- - Track record of leading technical initiatives and
  mentoring other engineers

Experience Level:-

- 8-15 years of experience in software engineering with
  demonstrated expertise in AI systems development and
  deployment in the most recent years.
responsibilities: Lead the design and implementation of sophisticated AI workflows and agentic systems that automate complex business processes
Architect scalable AI solutions that integrate with Pattern's existing technology stack and business operations
Mentor junior AI engineers and provide technical leadership across AI initiatives
Collaborate with product and business teams to identify high-impact opportunities for AI implementation
Develop proof-of-concepts and prototypes to validate AI approaches before full implementation
Establish best practices, coding standards, and architectural patterns for AI development
Contribute to the company's AI strategy and roadmap in partnership with leadership
use_cases: Ecommerce marketplace optimization across 60+ global platforms including Amazon, Walmart, TikTok Shop
Automated advertising and content management for global brands
Pricing optimization and forecasting using machine learning
Customer service automation through AI workflows
Complex business process automation using agentic AI patterns
ai_classification_reasoning:
This is a hands-on AI engineering role that directly builds
and deploys LLM-based systems, RAG implementations, fine-
tuning workflows, and agentic AI architectures. The role
involves designing sophisticated AI workflows and
implementing production AI systems to automate complex
business processes, not just supporting AI teams.
